variants.label: Proof-led
variants.message: Hi, I noticed Acme is scaling its platform team. I led a similar buildout at Stripe where we grew API adoption 3x in 12 months. Would love to chat about how I could help.

variants.label: Question-led
variants.message: Hi, curious how Acme thinks about developer experience for its API platform. I spent 4 years in this space at Stripe and have some ideas I would love to share.

variants.label: Value-led
variants.message: Hi, I helped scale Stripe's API platform from 2K to 10K active developers. I see Acme is tackling similar challenges and would love to bring that experience to your team.

followups.message: Following up on my note about the platform team. Happy to share more specifics about what worked at Stripe if helpful.
Last note — would love to chat about the platform role. Either way, wishing Acme well on the build.
